name: Llama and Alpaca Trekking with Raclette Liechtenstein
description: Discover Llama and Alpaca Trekking with Raclette Liechtenstein in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Llama and Alpaca Trekking with Raclette Liechtenstein in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Llama and alpaca trekking
subcategory.description: Book now your excursion with llama or alpaca trekking. The beautiful and curious animals fit almost every event: whether children's birthday party, wedding or school trip. A hike with the animals through the mountains or along meadows and rivers is a special experience for young and old. Get to know the cute animals up close while you walk with them through beautiful landscapes.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
